sentences.arabic: يُوَفِّرُ الْإِنْتَرْنِتُ مَصَادِرَ تَعْلِيمِيَّةً كَثِيرَةً لِلْطُّلَّابِ حَوْلَ الْعَالَمِ.
sentences.translation: Internet pruža mnoge obrazovne izvore učenicima širom svijeta.
sentences.translationEn: The internet provides many educational resources for students around the world.

sentences.arabic: يُمْكِنُكَ دِرَاسَةُ اللُّغَاتِ وَالْعُلُومِ عَبْرَ الْمَوَاقِعِ الْإِلِكْتُرُونِيَّةِ.
sentences.translation: Možete učiti jezike i nauke putem web stranica.
sentences.translationEn: You can study languages and sciences through websites.

sentences.arabic: شَاهَدَ أَخِي دُرُوسًا مُفِيدَةً عَلَى مَنْصَّةِ الْيُوتِيُوبِ الْأُسْبُوعَ الْمَاضِيَ.
sentences.translation: Moj brat je prošle sedmice gledao korisne lekcije na YouTube platformi.
sentences.translationEn: My brother watched useful lessons on the YouTube platform last week.
